title: ボクとマヤノとオトナの時間

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On our way back from buying equipment for
Tokai Teio...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
We've been walking foreveeer. I'm tiiiired. Hey,
can we take a break for a second?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Yay! Then, let's go to a cafe!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: As she wishes, we drop by a nearby cafe...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Hey, it's Teio!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Heyo, Mayano! Are you taking a break here too?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Hehe. ♪ Why, yes I am!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I'm here to drink some black coffee!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
And with this sip of maturity, I'll take flight into
the skies of adulthood one step ahead of you! ☆

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hey! I can drink black coffee too, you know!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Just watch me! Trainer, Mayano, let's get in there!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
True to their word, both Teio and Mayano order
black coffee.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Several minutes later, their drinks arrive.
However...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: ...Ngh.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: S-so bitter!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Um, I mean! The bitterness adds such a mature
taste, doesn't it? ♪

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Y-yep! But don't you think it's a bit too mature for you?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: M-me? You're the one who looks like you've eaten some sour plums!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems neither is enjoying the black coffee's
bitterness.
choice_data_list:
How about we leave the "adult" tastes for next
time?
I could go for some sweets right about now.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: N-no way! I wanna settle this here and now!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Same! An adult never gives up!
choice_data_list:
Adults are allowed to like other flavors too, you
know.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After I point that out, their eagerness to prove
themselves fades and the pair falls into a sudden
silence.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: ...Th-that does make some sense.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Adults have discerning palates, don't they?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They both look at each other, nod, then begin to
add copious amounts of milk, sugar, and syrup to
their cups.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Aaah! This still makes me feel pretty mature.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Yeah! But not as mature as me!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Don't be such a sore loser!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You're one to talk! My victory was inevitable right
from the beginning!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hey, you think so too right, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
What?! Then I'm gonna try a whole bunch of
drinks and show you how mature I really am!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, they order an array of sweet drinks
and enjoy refining their "adult" tastes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems Teio learned something from her drinking
contest with her friend.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The moment I say it, I feel their gaze on me.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
O-oh, you do, huh? Now that I think about it, I'm
pretty hungry too.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Me too! Something like pancakes with a bunch of
whipped cream sounds nice.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Well, if you're gonna order, then we might as well
order something too.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Good idea!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They both order some dessert to wash away the
bitterness of the black coffee.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: ...Mmm, that was delicious!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to their sweet desserts, they were both
able to finish their black coffees.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
My pancakes were so good! I'm gonna order 'em
again the next time I come!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, the fruit parfait was great too! And the ice
cream was so creamy! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Hehe. I feel so mature already!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Yeah! We look totally different now, don't we?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Come on! You're supposed to say "Yes!" and
praise us!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Teio looks disappointed, but after I apologize for
my rash remarks and praise her, her mood
instantly brightens.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems she learned something from spending
some "grown-up time" with Mayano.
